headline: Jim Cramer Suggests “Might Want to Get Some GE Vernova”
summary: GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) was one of the stocks featured in Jim Cramer’s Mad Money recap, as he discussed how the AI build-out could power the economy. Cramer mentioned the stock during the episode and said: Take a look at these. These companies are hiring like mad because they know the demand for electricity is […]

headline: Vistra (VST): The Best Power Generation Stock To Buy For Data Center Demand
summary: Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) is one of the 15 Best Power Generation Stocks To Buy For Data Center Demand. On May 4, 2026, TD Cowen analyst Shelby Tucker lowered the firm’s price target on Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) to $230 from $253 previously and maintained a Buy rating on the shares.
